codeReview.summary: Feature is a verification-only task - the Apple Music button implementation already existed in App.tsx (lines 276-282). The worker correctly verified the behavior through browser inspection. Implementation correctly uses Button asChild with disabled prop bound to !album, and renders an anchor tag with href={album?.apple_music_url}, target='_blank', and rel='noreferrer' for secure cross-origin navigation.

summary: PASS - The 'Open in Apple Music' button feature was verified as correctly implemented. The button is properly disabled when no album is loaded, and when an album is present, it renders as an anchor tag pointing to the album's Apple Music URL with target='_blank' and rel='noreferrer' for secure external navigation. All expected behaviors for VAL-CROSS-010 are satisfied.
